title: calophaca nigricans
intro: Calophaca nigricans, also known as the Himalayan sweet pea or black calophaca, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Calophaca nigricans include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Calophaca nigricans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
